title: jasminum marianum
intro: Jasminum marianum, also known as the 'Star Jasmine', is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Jasminum marianum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its potential medicinal and health benefits.
